extra.reason: P0-3: Created schema/migrations.ts with applyMigrations, integrated into connection.ts. P1-5: Extended schema/rows.ts with 6 missing row types (Snapshot, Artifact, Edge, ConstraintRule, SchemaVersion, InboxProcessed). P1-6: Added hypotheses table stub to TABLES_DDL and FK on events.linked_hypothesis_id → hypotheses(id). 41/41 tests green.

redactEvent now wraps payload/source in {value: ...} envelope before scanValue, ensuring all hits have non-empty fieldPath (payload.* or source.*). Updated RedactorShape.scanValue to accept optional path arg. Added 4 new tests: 3 in redaction.test.ts (top-level string, nested object, array-indexed) + 1 in event-store.test.ts (verifying field_path starts with payload.). All 41 db tests pass, tsc clean.

Work done via Cognit-2k5 (inbox R-channel) + Cognit-eeg (chokidar path-segment + actor_type validation). Atomic rename ingest, race-safety, idempotency all implemented in packages/db/src/inbox.ts. Test coverage: 6 tests in inbox.test.ts including 2 new tests for the watcher smoke + path-segment match.

Phase 1 implementation complete: all 7 P1 deliverables shipped across commits 693848f, 273309d, b4eb156, 1d88ef7. 46/46 tests pass, tsc clean. Bead breakdown: 1a scaffold (packages/db with Effect Layer arch) → 1b drizzle schema + migration runner (TABLES_DDL + applyMigrations + WAL + integrity_check) → 1c Effect Schema registry (PAYLOAD_SCHEMAS_V1 + CURRENT_VERSION) → 1d migration utility (migratePayload + semver) → 1e redaction service (Redactor Tag + Live + redactEvent envelope) → 1f EventStore service (append + list + get with NotFound failure) → 1h tests (46 cases covering all acceptance criteria)
